title: Deguelia amoena
taxonomy: Deguelia amoena belongs to the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the legume or pea family. This classification reflects its botanical characteristics and shared traits with other plants in the family. Within the Fabaceae family, Deguelia amoena is further classified as a part of the tribe Sophoreae. Its classification system is based on the botanical principles of nomenclature and classification.

The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial and antifungal activities, providing relief from various health conditions.
